name: PEABODY ENERGY CORP
summary: PARTI . Overview Peabody is a leading producer of metallurgical and thermal coal. The Company owned interests in 16active coal mining operations located in the United States (U.S.) and Australia at December31, 2025. Included in that count is Peabodys 50% equity interest in Middlemount Coal Pty Ltd.(Middlemount). During 2025, Peabody continued to advance the development of the Centurion Mine, an underground longwall metallurgical coal mine in Queensland, Australia. Full-scale longwall production ...
